div.p: Uganda's premier wines & spirits destination
Are you 18 years of age or older?
By entering this site you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Please drink responsibly.
Sorry, you must be 18 or older to access this website. Redirecting…

a.class: co-nav-icon-btn co-nav-whatsapp d-flex align-items-center gap-2 text-decoration-none

span.t-attf-class: co-nav-badge o_wsale_wishlist_number #{'d-none' if not wishcount else ''}
co-nav-badge o_cart_quantity #{'d-none' if not cart_qty else ''}

a.class: co-nav-icon-btn text-decoration-none dropdown-toggle d-flex align-items-center gap-2

div.class: h-100 w-100 d-flex flex-column justify-content-end p-4
div.p: Join our exclusive circle for premium releases.
No account? Create one
Have an account? Sign In
Visit Uganda's premier wines and spirits boutiques for specialized collections and sommelier recommendations.

li.span: Kirabo Complex - Ground Floor, Plot No 2101, Bukoto Kisasi Road, Kampala, Uganda

Mon - Sat: 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Sun: 12:00 PM - 6:00 PM
Vrajdan Building - Shop No 23, Plot No 12, Lubas Road, Jinja, Uganda

Mon - Sat: 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Sun: 12:00 PM - 6:00 PM

div.p: Experience luxury beverages with our range of personalized services.
Personalized wine and spirits tastings with our certified sommeliers.
Get personalized recommendations from our wines and spirits experts.
Professional climate-controlled storage for valuable wine collections.
Host exclusive wine tastings and corporate events at our venues.
Find quick answers to common questions about our products, store locations, deliveries, and payment methods.

button.style: font-family: var(--co-font-heading); font-size: 1.1rem; padding: 1.25rem; background-color: #ffffff; color: var(--co-burgundy) !important;

h2.button: Where are your physical stores located in Uganda?

div.div:
You can visit our boutique physical stores at:
Kampala Flagship: Kirabo Complex, Ground Floor, Plot No 2101, Bukoto Kisasi Road.
Jinja Branch: Vrajdan Building, Shop No 23, Plot No 12, Lubas Road, Jinja City.

h2.button: What are your store operating hours?

div.div:
Our stores are open during the following hours:
Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM
Sunday: 12:00 PM – 6:00 PM

h2.button: Do you deliver orders, and what are the delivery charges?

div.div: Yes, we provide express delivery service. Delivery fees depend on your exact location. Free delivery is available for orders above a certain threshold. You can see delivery options during checkout or coordinate delivery directly with us via WhatsApp.

h2.button: Can I place an order directly on WhatsApp?

div.div: Absolutely! You can click the WhatsApp icon/link on the top-right header or bottom footer of our site to start a chat with our customer support and place your order directly.

h2.button: Are all your beverages authentic and original imports?

div.div: Yes. We source our wines and spirits directly from authentic vineyards and licensed distributors worldwide. Every bottle in our catalog is guaranteed 100% original.

h2.button: What payment methods do you accept?

div.div: We accept Cash on Delivery, Mobile Money (MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money), and credit/debit card transactions. All transactions are securely processed.

div.p: Still have questions?
Uganda's Premier Wines & Spirits Boutique
Discover our curated selection of fine wines, premium spirits, beers, and ciders from around the world.
From Old World classics to New World treasures
Browse our carefully curated wine selection — reds, whites, sparkling, and rosé from renowned vineyards across the globe.
Bold, complex, unforgettable
From Cabernet Sauvignon to Merlot — explore our collection of full-bodied reds perfect for every occasion.
Crisp, elegant, refreshing
Discover our selection of exquisite white wines — from buttery Chardonnays to crisp Sauvignon Blancs.
Celebrate life's moments
From Champagne to Prosecco — our sparkling wine selection adds elegance to any celebration.
Delicate, romantic, vibrant
Explore our rosé collection — from dry Provençal styles to fruit-forward New World favourites.
The world's finest, at your doorstep
Discover our hand-picked collection of whiskies, gins, vodkas, and rums from the world's most respected distilleries.
Aged to perfection
From Scotch single malts to Kentucky bourbon — explore our curated whisky selection for every palate.
Crafted with botanicals
Discover our gin collection — from classic London Dry to contemporary craft gins infused with exotic botanicals.
Pure and smooth
Explore our premium vodka selection — from classic grain spirits to modern artisan expressions.
Tropical warmth in every sip
From light Caribbean rums to dark aged varieties — our rum selection brings sunshine to your glass.
Crafted for enjoyment
Browse our beer selection — from crisp lagers to robust stouts, featuring both international favourites and local brews.
Crisp orchard freshness
Discover our refreshing cider collection — from traditional dry ciders to modern fruit-infused varieties.
Explore our collection
Browse our curated selection of fine beverages at Cellar One.
